description: Confluent provides a managed data streaming platform built around Apache Kafka, including Confluent Cloud for running Kafka clusters, connectors, stream governance, and stream processing. It also offers tooling and APIs for managing cloud resources and accessing operational metrics.
summary: Confluent exposes authenticated Confluent Cloud HTTP APIs plus a separate Metrics HTTP API, and a Confluent CLI; documented auth methods are Cloud API keys or Confluent STS bearer tokens for the HTTP APIs, with CLI login using saved credentials.
